title: Kanbus clock: issue_created should default missing status to OPEN

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Investigating regression: issue_created summary currently shows '?' when payload.status missing. Restoring semantic default OPEN and adding/adjusting tests.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fixed: issue_created summaries now default missing payload.status to OPEN (while preserving _format_status_text for explicit statuses). Added regression assertion in tests/test_kanbus_clock.py. Validation: python -m py_compile demos/kanbus_clock.py; uv run pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q (16 passed).
